title: myosotis tenuis
intro: Myosotis tenuis, also known as slender forget-me-not, is a perennial plant belonging to the borage family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Myosotis tenuis can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various herbal applications.
